description_long: This is a pair of casual low-top shoes featuring a muted greenish-gray fabric upper with brown leather accents on the heel and eyelets. The shoes have a rounded toe, a standard lace-up closure with light brown laces, and a beige rubber sole that shows some signs of wear. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the heel counter is reinforced with a brown leather patch. The stitching is visible along the sides and around the toe area, suggesting a sturdy construction. The overall design is simple and versatile, suitable for everyday urban wear. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A pair of casual greenish-gray low-top shoes with brown leather accents, beige rubber soles, and light brown laces, showing light wear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing brown leather heel patches and the padded interior of both shoes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the greenish-gray fabric upper, brown leather heel, and visible stitching along the side.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe, standard criss-cross lacing, and the slightly worn beige rubber soles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the shoe profile, lace arrangement, and subtle texture of the upper material.
